---
title: "Random forest amb VSURF"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-06-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")
load("dades_escenari_nul_corrAleat.RData")

library(VSURF)

una_iteracio_nul <- function(j, X_esc, Y_esc) {
  X_df  <- as.data.frame(X_esc[[j]])
  y_fac <- as.factor(Y_esc[[j]])

  tryCatch({
    model_vsurf <- VSURF(x = X_df, y = y_fac,
                         parallel = FALSE,
                         verbose  = FALSE)
    sel <- model_vsurf$varselect.interp
    ifelse(length(sel) == 0, 0, length(sel))
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("  [WARN VSURF] sim %d: %s\n", j, conditionMessage(e)))
    0
  })
}

resultats_fp_vsurf <- data.frame(
  N           = integer(),
  pi          = numeric(),
  correlation = character(),
  FP          = numeric(),
  FP_percent  = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

system.time({
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(comb))) {

    N           <- comb$N[i]
    pi          <- comb$pi[i]
    correlation <- as.character(comb$correlation[i])

    cat(sprintf("Escenari %d/%d (N=%s, pi=%s, cor=%s)\n",
                i, nrow(comb), N, pi, correlation))

    fp_vec <- numeric(iters)
    for (j in 1:iters) {
      cat(sprintf("  Simulació %d/%d\n", j, iters))
      fp_vec[j] <- una_iteracio_nul(j, X[[i]], Y[[i]])
    }

    resultats_fp_vsurf <- rbind(
      resultats_fp_vsurf,
      data.frame(
        N           = N,
        pi          = pi,
        correlation = correlation,
        FP          = mean(fp_vec),
        FP_percent  = mean(fp_vec) / num_vars,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )
  }
})

print(resultats_fp_vsurf)
save(resultats_fp_vsurf, file = "resultats_fp_vsurf_nul.RData")
```
